summary.sosovalue: Very low volume of community discussion excluding official accounts. One promotional mention of ValueChain, SoDEX, and MAG7ssi in DeFi context (neutral-positive). Overall neutral with minimal engagement.
summary.sodex: Extremely sparse mentions. Single critical post questioning liquidity provision for 500k holders and bridge reliability during market crash (negative). No counterpoints or engagement.
summary.ssi: One bearish post highlighting risks of SSI index model in crashes (negative). Isolated incident with zero replies or likes. Neutral elsewhere.
